name: @quoin/tokens-mantine
description: Mantine UI default palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Mantine v7 default palette (blue accent at step 6). Each colour ramp is a 10-entry hex array. Extraction method: A. Mapping: Mantine 10-step ramps (indices 0-9) extracted verbatim from default-colors.ts. The 'primaryShade' default is 6 (light theme); accent = blue.6 per Mantine's own convention.
